_meta.note: KRV-Validator endpoint map. 'verified:true' = endpoint confirmed by operator OR by live run (trust live_status). 'verified:false' = HYPOTHESIS / not cleanly verifiable. PAT-005: unknown endpoints stay auth_type=unknown / base_url='' so the validator writes live_status='unknown' rather than guessing. Auth_type values: bearer | query | header:NAME | none | unknown.

not_verified.ocr-space: probed GET /parse/imageurl?apikey=KEY -> http_400 (no image param); key reached API & auth accepted, but no /models endpoint => not a clean liveness signal. Endpoint/auth plausible, NOT cleanly verified by this validator.
not_verified.cloudflare: NOT probed (auth_type=unknown per PAT-005): requires account_id in path + validator bearer-adapter hardcodes /models, so /user/tokens/verify cannot be targeted.

sources.cerebras: docs/endpoint-research-2026-06-25.md + docs/provider-keys-guide.md (live GET /v1/models 200, OpenAI-compatible) + live run 2026-07-12
sources.openrouter: OpenAI-compatible /v1/models + Bearer (well-known, prior runs) + live run 2026-07-12
sources.elevenlabs: web-verify official docs https://elevenlabs.io/docs/api-reference/models/list (GET /v1/models, header xi-api-key) + live run 2026-07-12
sources.ocr-space: web-verify official docs https://ocr.space/ocrapi (auth via 'apikey' query param; no /models list endpoint) + live run 2026-07-12 (http_400)
sources.pollinations: docs/endpoint-research-2026-06-25.md (live GET /api/models 200, no auth) + live run 2026-07-12
sources.manus: docs/MANUS_CANONICAL.md VERIFIED: header x-manus-api-key, GET /v2/usage.availableCredits (LIVE+DOCS) + live run 2026-07-12
sources.cloudflare: PAT-005 unknown: account_id templating unsupported + validator bearer-adapter hardcodes /models; cannot target /user/tokens/verify
sources.cerebras-key: alias of 'cerebras' (keys dropped as 'cerebras key.md'); same endpoint + live run 2026-07-12

openrouter.instructions: VERIFIED by live run 2026-07-12: GET /v1/models returned 200 (valid) for the real vault key. OpenAI-compatible /v1/models + Bearer.

cohere.instructions: VERIFIED by live run 2026-07-12: GET /v1/models returned 200 (valid) for all 4 vault keys. Cohere v1 /models + Bearer.

mistral.instructions: VERIFIED by live run 2026-07-12: GET /v1/models returned 200 (valid) for both vault keys. Mistral AI /v1/models + Bearer.

cerebras.instructions: VERIFIED by live run 2026-07-12: GET /v1/models returned 200 (valid) for all 5 keys in api.keys (no region/TLS block observed this run). Cerebras inference /v1/models + Bearer (OpenAI-compatible).

cerebras-key.instructions: ALIAS of 'cerebras' (keys stored under 'cerebras-key', dropped as 'cerebras key.md'). VERIFIED by live run 2026-07-12: GET /v1/models 200 (valid) for all 5 keys. Same endpoint as 'cerebras'.

cloudflare.instructions: PAT-005 unknown: Cloudflare Workers AI requires account_id in path (https://api.cloudflare.com/client/v4/accounts/{account_id}/ai/v1/...) AND /ai/models returns 401. The only account_id-free token check is GET /client/v4/user/tokens/verify (Bearer), but the validator's bearer-adapter hardcodes /models (=> /user/tokens/verify/models, 404) and the header-adapter sends the raw secret without the 'Bearer ' prefix. So this validator cannot cleanly probe Cloudflare -> live_status stays unknown (NOT probed in live run 2026-07-12). A dedicated CF adapter (token-verify + account_id templating) is needed.

elevenlabs.instructions: VERIFIED by live run 2026-07-12: GET /v1/models returned 200 (valid) for 6/7 vault keys (1 key expired). Header xi-api-key (web-verified official docs 2026-07-12).

ocr-space.instructions: NOT cleanly verified. Live run 2026-07-12: GET /parse/imageurl?apikey=KEY returned http_400 (missing image param). The key reached the API and auth was accepted, but OCR.space has NO /models list endpoint, so this is not a clean liveness signal. Endpoint/auth knowledge (apikey query param) is web-verified official docs, but this validator cannot confirm key validity without an image. Kept verified:false.

pollinations.instructions: VERIFIED by live run 2026-07-12: GET /api/models returned 200 (valid), no auth. (docs/endpoint-research-2026-06-25 live 200.)

manus.instructions: VERIFIED per docs/MANUS_CANONICAL.md (LIVE+DOCS 2026-07-11): auth header x-manus-api-key, GET /v2/usage.availableCredits. Live run 2026-07-12: 200 (valid) for 5/6 vault keys (1 key expired/invalid_key). Returns 200 with credits JSON for a valid key.
